title: Reference Tropical Flatlay Beach Portrait AI Prompt
sourceTitle: Reference Tropical Flatlay Beach Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image photorealistic top-down tropical beach flat-lay portrait for reference portrait before top-down tropical beach flat-lay transformation, preserving adult woman from the reference photo. Subject: adult woman from the reference photo lies on a woven beach mat wearing blush pink resort crop top layered with a high-waisted micro-pleated coral-pattern wrap skirt, small pearls, and shell embellishments, with exact face identity preserved from the reference photo and natural facial detail retained. Scene: tropical beach with woven beach mat, large palm tree, sand, palm fronds, and warm resort atmosphere beneath a large palm tree, with sand grain, woven mat texture, fabric embellishments, pearls, shells, and natural beach detail. Composition: Fixed top-down 24mm wide flat-lay perspective, subject centered beneath palm-frond shadows, surrounding tropical elements included, and body placement tasteful and editorial. Signature Elements: Preserved reference tropical flatlay beach portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Ultra-realistic luxury travel influencer photography with natural dappled sunlight, minimal retouching, high-resolution texture detail, and editorial resort atmosphere. Color Palette: Fixed tropical beach neutrals, blush pink wardrobe accents, coral details, warm sand, palm green, and natural sunlight contrast. Lighting: Natural dappled sunlight through palm fronds casting high-contrast zebra-stripe shadows across the mat, fabric, face, mat, and sand; Camera: Overhead 24mm editorial perspective, wide enough to include palm shadow, sand, woven mat, and surrounding beach cues while keeping the subject readable. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
